mappings.notes: Same bug as HubSpot→AC. Wrapper required. Check middleware payload format.
mappings.fixStrategy: Wrap in contactTag object. Verify with curl before production.

mappings.notes: Dropdown option values must match picklist values exactly. Mismatch silently drops the value.
mappings.fixStrategy: Audit picklist options on both sides. Create AC dropdown options matching SF values.

mappings.toolAValue: Contact updated in Salesforce (any field change)
mappings.notes: Unintended re-triggers send duplicate emails. Common issue with bidirectional sync.
mappings.fixStrategy: Use 'contact added to list' trigger. Add metadata field to track sync version.

mappings.notes: AC normalizes phone on write. Re-reading shows different format than sent.
mappings.fixStrategy: Store phone as text field in AC to prevent normalization. Or accept AC format as canonical.

errors.description: Mismatched dropdown option values silently dropped.
errors.fixSummary: Exact match audit between picklist options and dropdown options.
